---
title: "Week 07"
---

::: {style="color: #F66D7A"}
### Monday (3/30)
:::

**Topics**

-   Normal distribution (yay!)

**Daily assignment**

To be completed and submitted to Canvas by 9:00am

-   [Daily assignment](daily/DA_18.pdf)

**Class activity**

-   Normal dist. [practice problems](class/CA_18.pdf)

------------------------------------------------------------------------

::: {style="color: #F66D7A"}
### Wednesday (4/01)
:::

**Topics**

-   Exponential

**Daily assignment**

To be completed and submitted to Canvas by 9:00am

-   [Daily assignment](daily/DA_19.pdf)

**Class activity**

-   TBD

------------------------------------------------------------------------

::: {style="color: #F66D7A"}
### Friday (4/03)
:::

**Please bring laptops to class!**

**Topics**

-   Universality of the Uniform
-   Continuous RVs in `R`

**Daily assignment**

-   None!

**Class activity**

-   Live code posted after class
    -   `.Rmd` template for in-class activity:
    -   Filled in version: Filled in code
